raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Rekabeams aismigge
ar faweein Tehweem/ un tappe
Dahwida Vili aprakts/ un Abijs winna Dehls tappe par
Rehnian winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XIII. Nodalla.
Abijus pamahza un johda Jerobeamu un win.
na Kaudis : 4. uswarre tohs paschus: 16.
Comehr ar itt leelu Kanschanu: 17. No.
mirst: 1.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. W Stotapadefinita Gad-
da ta Rehnina Jerobe-
Lama/ tappe Abijus par
Rehninu pahr Juhdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Wiꞥſch waldtja trihs Gad-
dus Jerusaleme/ un winna Mah-
tet bija Mikaja Wahrdã/ Uriêta
Meita no Gibejas. Un Kartch
zehlahs starp Abiju un starp Je-
robeainu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Un Abijus taiſijahs uē to
Kartu ar warrenu Karra Wihru
Spehku no tſchetrfimts tuhkſto-
scheim jauneem Wihreem. Un
Jerobeamis taiſijahs prett winnu
us Kartu ar aſtenſimts tuhkſto-
scheim jauneem warreneim ſtip-
reem Wihreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Un Abijus zehlehs no ta
Kalna Zemaram/ kas uē Ge-
waima Kalneem gull/ un taz-
zija: Klauſajt man Jerobeains
un wits Israēls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Neggt jums to bij finnaht/
ka tas KUNGS Israēta Deews
to Walstibu pahr Israēlu irr
Dahwidain dewis us muhschi-
geem Laikeem/ tiklabbi winnam/
ka winna Dehleem zaar weenu
(ū) Sahls (ne isnihſtamu)
jerribu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu irr Jerob
Neebata Dehls Salan
Dahwida Dehla Kalps zeſ
un prett fawu Kungu D
Darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Ir pee winna irr fap
ſchees neleefschi Zilweki/
Kaudis/ un irr prett Rek-
mu Salamaza Dehln stipr
ſchees/ kamehr Rekabeams
jauns un tam glehiva Sirā
ka tas prett winnee
warreja spehzinatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Un nu dohmajat juhs
ta KUNGA Walstibu stip
tees/ kas Dahwida De
Rohkā irr/ juhs gann effa
Bulks/ bet pee jums irr
Zelfti/ko Jerobeams jums ir
Deeween darrije.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Neggt juhs eſtat ta
GA Preesterus Aārona D
tohs Lewitus isdsinnuschi/
fat ſewim Preesterus darri
ittin ka to (Paganu) Sen
Laudis? ikkatrs kas nahe
Rohkn pildidams ar weenu
nu Wehrſi un ſeptineim
neem/ tas tohp par Preester
do/ kas Deewi ne irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Bet ar mums irr
KUNGS unhsu Deews
mehs winnu ne eſtam affi
ſcht/ un tee Preesteki/ kas
KUNGA M kalpo irr Al
Dehli/ un tee Lewiti irr p
Darba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un tee eededsing
KUNGAM Dedfamo-Upp
ikrihtu un iſwakkaru/ir Kwe
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
